panels.description: Race clock starting from race start time

targets.rawSql: SELECT start_time FROM race LIMIT 1;

panels.description: Race start time, estimated finish date/time, and estimated finish clock time

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(start_time AT TIME ZONE '$timezone', 'FMMM/FMDD FMHH12:MI AM') as start_time FROM race;

panels.description: Date and time of last ping received with valid data and the average period of time between updates

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN last_update = '1970-01-01 00:00:00' THEN '--/-- --:--'
        ELSE to_char(last_update AT TIME ZONE '$timezone', 'FMMM/FMDD FMHH12:MI AM')
    END AS last_update_display
FROM runner ORDER BY last_update;

WITH lagged AS (
    SELECT
        last_update,
        LAG(last_update) OVER (ORDER BY last_update) AS prev
    FROM runner
    WHERE mile_mark <> 0
)
SELECT
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (last_update - prev))) AS average_difference_seconds
FROM lagged
WHERE prev IS NOT NULL;

panels.description: Total time, time spent outside of aid, and time spent in aid from last valid ping
Average pace outside of aid stations; average pace  including stoppage time

targets.rawSql: SELECT (average_moving_pace * 60)::int AS average_moving_pace FROM runner ORDER BY last_update;
SELECT (average_overall_pace * 60)::int AS average_overall_pace FROM runner ORDER BY last_update;

panels.description: Runner's last reported mile mark, altitude, and estimated deviance from the course

targets.rawSql: SELECT mile_mark FROM runner ORDER BY last_update;
SELECT altitude FROM runner ORDER BY last_update;
SELECT course_deviation FROM runner ORDER BY last_update;

panels.description: Total number of pings received, count of position report pings, and percentage of position reports that had GPS reception

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pings;
SELECT COUNT(*) as position_report_pings FROM pings WHERE message_code = 'Position Report';

SELECT 
  COALESCE(
    100 * SUM(CASE WHEN gps_fix = '3D Fix' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
    0
  ) AS gps_fix_pct
FROM pings;

SELECT 
  name, 
  mile_mark, 
  gmaps_url, 
CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(
        NULLIF(arrival_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz),
        NULLIF(estimated_arrival_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz)
    ) IS NULL
    THEN '--/-- --:--'
    
    ELSE to_char(
        COALESCE(
            NULLIF(arrival_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz),
            NULLIF(estimated_arrival_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz)
        ) AT TIME ZONE '$timezone',
        'FMMM/FMDD FMHH12:MI AM'
    )
END AS arrival_time,
  CASE 
    WHEN departure_time = '1970-01-01 00:00:00' THEN '--/-- --:--'
    ELSE to_char(departure_time AT TIME ZONE '$timezone', 'FMMM/FMDD FMHH12:MI AM')
  END AS departure_time,
  stoppage_time,
  is_passed, 
  comments 
FROM aidstations ORDER BY mile_mark;

SELECT 
  name, 
  mile_mark, 
  distance,
  gain,
  loss,
  estimated_duration,
  is_passed
FROM legs ORDER BY mile_mark;

SELECT
  timestamp,
  latlon[0] AS latitude,
  latlon[1] AS longitude
FROM pings WHERE gps_fix = '3D Fix';

SELECT
  latlon[0] AS latitude,
  latlon[1] AS longitude
FROM pings WHERE gps_fix = '3D Fix' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    (d.value)::float AS distance,
    (e.value)::float AS elevation
FROM race,
     jsonb_array_elements(distances) WITH ORDINALITY AS d(value, ordinality)
JOIN LATERAL
     jsonb_array_elements(elevations) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
     ON d.ordinality = e.ordinality;

SELECT
    name,
    mile_mark AS distance,
    altitude AS elevation
FROM aidstations;

SELECT
    name,
    mile_mark AS distance,
    altitude AS elevation
FROM runner
LIMIT 1;
